summary: Completed iteration 5 testing of Lingo Land educational app. All Step 2 features verified: Consonant-le syllable fix working correctly (bottle→BOT·TLE, puddle→PUD·DLE, little→LIT·TLE, middle→MID·DLE), Shift+Click range selection in PreGame, Sort buttons (A-Z, Z-A, Level) in PreGame and WordBank, Camera OCR mock tab in import modal, Task-based navigation from Dashboard (Learn/Test bypass word selection), and session-end marks task day complete via POST /tasks/{id}/day/{num}/complete.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint accessible
Backend: Login with valid credentials returns token
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /words returns user's words
Backend: POST /words adds new words
Backend: GET /tasks/active returns active task with schedule
Backend: POST /tasks/{task_id}/day/{day_num}/complete marks day as completed (CRITICAL)
Backend: Invalid task ID returns 404
Backend: GET /activity/today returns activity data
Backend: GET /activity/weekly returns progress percentage
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Progress: X/5 Days Complete' text (data-testid='task-progress-text')
Frontend: Dashboard Learn button navigates to /learn with task words pre-selected (3 words)
Frontend: Dashboard Test button navigates directly to /game (bypasses PreGame)
Frontend: Syllable 'stalactites' → 'STA · LAC · TITES' (3 units, preserved)
Frontend: Syllable 'bottle' → 'BOT · TLE' (consonant-le fix, CRITICAL)
Frontend: Syllable 'puddle' → 'PUD · DLE' (consonant-le fix)
Frontend: Syllable 'little' → 'LIT · TLE' (consonant-le fix)
Frontend: Syllable 'middle' → 'MID · DLE' (consonant-le fix)
Frontend: Syllable 'complete' → 'COMP · LETE' (silent-e preserved)
Frontend: PreGame sort A-Z button exists (data-testid='pregame-sort-alpha')
Frontend: PreGame sort Z-A button exists (data-testid='pregame-sort-alpha-desc')
Frontend: PreGame sort Level button exists (data-testid='pregame-sort-level')
Frontend: PreGame Shift+Click selects range of words (3 words selected)
Frontend: WordBank Z-A sort button exists (data-testid='sort-alpha-desc')
Frontend: WordBank Camera tab exists in import modal (data-testid='import-type-camera')
Frontend: WordBank Camera input has capture='environment' attribute
Frontend: LearnSpelling shows 'bot · tle' syllables correctly
seed_data_creation: Added words: puddle, little, middle for consonant-le testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Step 2 features verified. Consonant-le syllable fix working in both LearnPage.js and LearnSpelling.js. PreGame has sort buttons (A-Z, Z-A, Level) and Shift+Click range selection. WordBank has Z-A sort and Camera OCR tab (MOCKED - adds 'excavate', 'stalactites', 'geology' after 2s delay). Dashboard task navigation works - Learn button goes to /learn with words pre-selected, Test button goes directly to /game. Task day completion endpoint POST /tasks/{id}/day/{num}/complete working.

wordbank_camera_ocr.description: Camera tab in import modal with capture='environment', adds mock words after 2s delay

dashboard_task_navigation.learn_button: Navigates to /learn with task words pre-selected

mocked_apis.camera_ocr: WordBank Camera OCR import - always adds 'excavate', 'stalactites', 'geology' regardless of image
